name: Johnny Appleseed Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Apple juice (for Welbilt DAK machines add 3 tablespoons more)
1/2 cup Granny Smith apple, cored, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread pan.
2. Select Light crust setting and press start.
3. Allow to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
This recipe is found in "Bread Machine Magic" by Linda Rehberg and Lois Conway on page 94.
